title: globba xantholeuca
intro: Globba xantholeuca, also known as yellow turmeric, is a species of flowering plant in the ginger family (Zingiberaceae). It is native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Globba xantholeuca include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as exhibiting potential antiviral and antifungal activities. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared by boiling the rhizomes in water to make a decoction, which can be used to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and digestive issues.
